name: dualread-ai-translator
description: Open-source Chrome MV3 extension for AI bilingual webpage translation with OpenAI-compatible providers.

scripts.check: npm run audit:public && node --check shared.js && node --check background.js && node --check content.js && node --check popup.js && node --check options.js && node --check scripts/generate-locales.js && node --check scripts/audit-publication.js && node --check test/shared.test.js && node --check test/background.test.js && node --check test/e2e-local-fixtures.js && node --check test/e2e-ui-fixtures.js && node --check test/e2e-content-samples.js && node --check test/extension-smoke.js
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:shared && npm run test:background && npm run test:ui && npm run test:local && npm run test:smoke
